name: antares-memory-skill
description: Persistent semantic + keyword memory for Claude Code — auto-extract, auto-inject, hybrid search, daemon-backed

plugins.name: antares-memory-skill
plugins.description: Turnkey persistent memory system: embeddings (sentence-transformers) + BM25 hybrid search, UNIX-socket daemon, PreCompact auto-extraction via headless claude -p, journal, slug-based HOME/CURRENT scopes (native Claude Code convention — no @-import needed), frontmatter taxonomy
